title: AI to Revolutionize MSME Manufacturing, Unlock Trillions in Growth
description: Artificial Intelligence could significantly boost India's Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in manufacturing, potentially contributing USD 135.6 to 149.9 billion by 2035. A PwC report highlights how AI adoption can transform MSMEs into competitive players globally, with opportunities reaching USD 3.13-3.21 trillion by 2047.
content: A groundbreaking report by PwC reveals that Artificial Intelligence (AI) could dramatically enhance India's Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) within the manufacturing sector, potentially injecting as much as USD 149.9 billion by 2035. The ... [1052 chars]

title: AI integration expected to contribute up to USD 150 billion to manufacturing sector MSMEs by 2035: Report
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) could contribute between USD 135.6 billion and USD 149.9 billion to the growth of Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in the manufacturing sector as early as 2035. This projection, according to a PwC report titled 'Unlocking the AI Edge for MSMEs,' remains contingent on these enterprises accounting for 50 per cent of the nation's manufacturing value added.
content: New Delhi [India], March 8 (ANI): Artificial Intelligence (AI) could contribute between USD 135.6 billion and USD 149.9 billion to the growth of Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in the manufacturing sector as early as 2035. This projectio... [2526 chars]

title: Global debt markets stay resilient despite record borrowing and rising risks
description: The OECD’s Global Debt Report 2026 finds that global debt markets remain stable despite record borrowing by governments and corporations, driven by refinancing needs and major investments such as artificial intelligence infrastructure. However, rising interest rates, growing reliance on short-term debt and a shift toward more price-sensitive investors could increase market vulnerability to future financial shocks.
content: The Global Debt Report 2026, prepared by the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) through its Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs and the Capital Markets and Financial Institutions Division, examines how sovereig... [5955 chars]

title: Kerala unveils Cyber Safety Protocol to safeguard students in AI era
description: Thiruvananthapuram, Mar 8 (PTI) In a landmark move to address the complexities of the Artificial Intelligence era, the Kerala Infrastructure and Technology for Education (KITE) has published the ‘Cyber Safety Protocol 2026’. KITE is the technology wing of the General Education Department of the state government. This comprehensive framework is designed to ensure a secure […]
content:
Developed through a meticulous analysis of emerging AI-driven challenges and cybercrimes, the protocol aligns with existing legal standards to provide targeted directives for institutional heads, teachers, parents, and students, it said.

description: AI company Anthropic is developing an early warning system designed to track how artificial intelligence could affect white-collar jobs.

title: ‘About principle, not people’, OpenAI's robotics head quits after company's Pentagon deal - Who is Caitlin Kalinowski?
description: The head of OpenAI’s robotics team resigned Saturday, citing the company’s deal to deploy its artificial intelligence models within the Pentagon’s classified network as the cause.

title: Kerala revises minimum wages for private hospital nurses; UNA to continue stir
description: UNA declared that nurses would not withdraw from the indefinite strike unless the government raises their monthly pay to 40,000..Kerala nurse minimum wage, private hospital nurse salary hike, nursing staff pay revision Kerala, new minimum wage nurses Kerala, AI driven wage analysis nursing, LLM impact on healthcare wages, Kerala nursing wage dispute, healthcare worker salary increase, nurses strike Kerala update, revised nursing pay scale Kerala, healthcare employment laws Kerala, artificial intelligence in wage setting, large language models for salary prediction, Kerala government labour department notification, private healthcare sector wages
content:
